Zentropy — Curious engineering, made tangible

Rapid prototyping, engineering-grade 3D printing, 3D scanning, and electronics prototyping — materials and processes tuned for real use.

Get a quote See our work

  • Engineering materials & testing
  • Custom electronics & prototyping
  • Design for manufacture

About Zentropy

Zentropy.Solutions pairs engineering-grade 3D printing with practical materials knowledge and electronics prototyping. We help move projects from curious idea to robust prototype, with CAD, scanning and test-backed materials selection.

Why choose us

  • Engineered materials for demanding applications
  • Rapid iteration with real-world testing
  • From conceptual design to electronics integration

Services

🖨️

3D Printing

High-performance materials, structural printing, and post-processing.

🧭

3D Scanning & CAD

Scan, clean, CAD — create manufacturable models and assemblies.

🔌

Electronics & Prototyping

Small-batch PCBs, microcontrollers, and integration with mechanical designs.

Selected Work
